## Overview

The Gen AI Adapter Connector transforms [OpenInference](https://arize-ai.github.io/openinference/spec/semantic_conventions.html) spans from GenAI frameworks (LangChain, Bedrock, LlamaIndex, CrewAI) into [OTel GenAI semantic conventions](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/gen-ai/).

It supports two pipeline paths:

- **traces-to-traces**: Transforms span attributes from OpenInference format to OTel GenAI semconv (e.g., `llm.model_name` to `gen_ai.request.model`, `llm.token_count.prompt` to `gen_ai.usage.input_tokens`).
- **traces-to-logs**: Extracts Large Language Object (LLO) content (prompts, completions, tool calls) from span attributes and events, and emits them as Gen AI log events with structured input/output messages in the [OTel semconv parts format](https://github.com/open-telemetry/semantic-conventions/blob/main/docs/gen-ai/gen-ai-input-messages.json).

## Configuration

```yaml
connectors:
  genaiadapterconnector:

service:
  pipelines:
    traces/in:
      receivers: [otlp]
      exporters: [genaiadapterconnector]
    traces/out:
      receivers: [genaiadapterconnector]
      exporters: [debug]
    logs/out:
      receivers: [genaiadapterconnector]
      exporters: [debug]
```

Either or both receiver pipelines (`traces/out`, `logs/out`) can be configured independently.

## How It Works

### Trace Transformation

The connector maps OpenInference span attributes to OTel GenAI semantic conventions:

| OpenInference Attribute | OTel GenAI Attribute |
| ----------------------- | -------------------- |
| `llm.model_name` | `gen_ai.request.model` |
| `llm.provider` / `llm.system` | `gen_ai.provider.name` |
| `llm.token_count.prompt` | `gen_ai.usage.input_tokens` |
| `llm.token_count.completion` | `gen_ai.usage.output_tokens` |
| `openinference.span.kind` | `gen_ai.operation.name` |
| `tool.name` | `gen_ai.tool.name` |
| `tool.description` | `gen_ai.tool.description` |
| `llm.invocation_parameters` | `gen_ai.request.temperature`, `gen_ai.request.top_p`, etc. |

OpenInference span kinds are mapped to OTel operation names:

| OpenInference Span Kind | OTel Operation Name |
| ------------------------ | ------------------- |
| `LLM` | `chat` |
| `AGENT` | `invoke_agent` |
| `TOOL` | `execute_tool` |
| `EMBEDDING` | `embeddings` |

### Log Event Extraction

Indexed message attributes (`llm.input_messages.*.message.role`, `llm.input_messages.*.message.content`) and LLO attributes (`input.value`, `output.value`, `gen_ai.prompt`, etc.) are extracted from spans and emitted as structured log events:

```json
{
  "input": {
    "messages": [
      {"role": "user", "parts": [{"type": "text", "content": "What's the weather?"}]}
    ]
  },
  "output": {
    "messages": [
      {"role": "assistant", "parts": [{"type": "text", "content": "72F and sunny."}], "finish_reason": "stop"}
    ]
  }
}
```

Tool calls and tool responses are also structured:

```json
{
  "output": {
    "messages": [
      {
        "role": "assistant",
        "parts": [{"type": "tool_call", "name": "get_weather", "id": "call_01", "arguments": "{\"city\": \"Seattle\"}"}],
        "finish_reason": "tool_call"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

### Supported Frameworks

- [LangChain](https://python.langchain.com/) (via [OpenInference](https://github.com/Arize-ai/openinference))
- [Amazon Bedrock](https://aws.amazon.com/bedrock/) (Converse API)
- [LlamaIndex](https://www.llamaindex.ai/)
- [CrewAI](https://www.crewai.com/)
